meaning: Writers Guild of America美国作家协会
examples: The preparation technique of WGA was improved and optimized.
The effect of wheat germ agglutinin (WGA) to promote the bacterial resistence of Penaeus orientalis was studied.
The tentative three-year WGA deal builds upon gains obtained by the Directors Guild of America in its negotiations with studios last month.
The WGA has since said it would pursue separate talks with smaller, independent production companies.
"We haven't shown particular resolve in past negotiations, " said John Bowman, the WGA's chief negotiator.
